---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature for CipherBrowse
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow is hard, missing, or unreliable today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you want CipherBrowse to support.

## Command or workflow impact

Which commands, search modes, media flows, or storage behavior would change?

## Extra context

Links, examples, and terminal output are useful when they show the desired result.
